title: health check api returns system health status
description: Test GET /v1/health endpoint to verify it returns 200 status with correct JSON body indicating overall system health, including database and classifier status.

title: blocking chat api routes prompt and returns response with metadata
description: Test POST /v1/chat with valid API key and prompt to ensure prompt is classified, routed to appropriate LLM, optionally escalated on low-confidence, logged in database, and returns response with model_used, difficulty_tag, cost_usd, latency_ms, and escalated flag.

title: streaming chat api streams llm response with metadata and tokens
description: Test POST /v1/chat/stream with valid API key and prompt to verify streaming of newline-delimited JSON frames including metadata, token events, and done frame, with correct classification, routing, and escalation logic.

title: stats api returns aggregated telemetry data
description: Test GET /v1/stats with valid API key to verify it returns aggregated statistics including total requests, total cost, cost savings, model usage breakdown, escalation rate, and hourly savings time series.

title: recent requests api returns most recent logged requests
description: Test GET /v1/recent with valid API key and optional limit parameter to verify it returns the most recent requests ordered by timestamp descending, including fields like created_at, difficulty_tag, model_used, cost_usd, cost_saved_usd, latency_ms, and escalated.

title: feedback api accepts valid feedback and updates aggregates
description: Test POST /v1/feedback with valid API key and valid request_id and feedback (1 or -1) to verify feedback is accepted, stored in database, aggregates updated, and returns 200 with ok true.
